source_pr.title: test: stable fail point test
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Solve issue #15922 
The fail point path may be used by some background tasks, the test case become unstable

What's Changed:

Remove the usage in times

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test


Side effects


### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

evidence: evidence: PR title: stable fail point test.
evidence: explicitly disables failpoint before second getTimestampWithRetry to make t1>t2 deterministic (store/tikv/store_test.go).
